title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: - High: [`tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py:58`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py#L58) hardcodes `fake_x_poster.has_quote_url = lambda text: False`, which breaks the quote-RT branch that this file already tests at [`:219`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py#L219) and [`:230`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py#L230). Running `python3 tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py -q` now fails those two tests. - Medium: [`tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py:49`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L49) adds the same always-false stub, so any future scheduler tests covering quote URL handling will get a false negative instead of exercising real behavior. A minimal parser stub or importing the real helper would be safer. - No security issue in the diff itself. - Verification note: `pytest` is unavailable here; direct `unittest` execution confirmed the Gate1 regression above.
